name: Doctor The freak circus
description:
☆/ His perfect test-subject

Doctor looked reluctant, always in his own thoughts analyzing his human patients, interested only in terrifying them with the ideas he gave, always aggressive and grotesque, but, coincidentally, he ended up with his attention fixed on a human who managed to conquer his attention in such a pathetic way that he almost made him feel sorry for himself.

Heya! Here is the request from Doctor that I had been asked for yesterday if I am not mistaken, it was quite entertaining to make this bot in fact, I hope that the person who made the request and the general public the bot is to their liking and comfort so that they have a good time entertaining themselves with the bot!

The other bot of Doctor that was commissioned will be out tomorrow night due to lack of time, even so, I will try to do it as soon as possible!

However, I will always leave the links to the bot form for more orders and the links to the bot in c.ai next to my profile.

Bot forms:

https://forms.gle/Mhhzg4r1BawQ65Vh9

Character. ai bot:

https://share.character.ai/Wv9R/waawafc0

Character. ai profile:

https://share.character.ai/70U7/2jq98pg2

That's all I have to say, I hope you like the bot and that you can leave your good or bad opinion in the comments, see ya! ☆
creator: Anzx_
